DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

NO APPEARANCE BY COUNSEL ON SEP-12-2008. NO ARGUMENTS BY COUNSEL, THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING BECOMES THE RULING OF THE COURT AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PLTF'S MEMO OF COSTS IS DENIED. THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO AWARD COSTS TO PLAINTIFF, AS SET FORTH BELOW. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO TAX COSTS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART, AS FOLLOWS: LINE REFERENCES REFER TO THE MEMO OF COST (WORKSHEET) FILED BY PLAINTIFF. LINE 1: THE DISPUTED $260 IN COST ARE DISALLOWED ($29.50 SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT; $112.50 MOTIONS IN LIMINE, $118.00 FOR TRIAL DOCUMENTS, AS SHOWN IN PLAINTIFF'S INVOICES). THESE WERE MESSENGER FEES, NOT FILING AND MOTION FEES, AND THE COURT EXERCISES ITS DISCRETION TO DISALLOW THEM AS NOT NECESSARILY INCURRED. LINE 4(E):REGARDING LAWRENCE NODRHOFF DEPOSITION, $275.00 IN COST ARE DISALLOWED. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PERSONALLY INCUR THE WAIT TIME CHARGE OF $275, AND IT IS NOT RECOVERABLE AS A COST PURSUANT TO CCP 1033.5(A)(4). LINE 5: SERVICE OF PROCESS. MOTION TO TAX COST DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED INVOICES FOR ATTEMPTS TO SERVE PROCESS ON COLLEGE RICHARDS ($350) AND CLOSETS&MORE ($180), AND THESE COST WILL BE AWARDED PURSUANT TO CCP 1033.5(A)(4.) LINE 8: EXPERT WITNESS FEES. IN RESPONSE TO THE MOTION TO TAX COST, PLAINTIFF HAS REDUCED EXPERT WITNESS FEES AND SEEKS PAYMENT ONLY FOR EXPERT WITNESSES FEES INCURRED AFTER THE CPP 998 OFFER ON AUGUST 31, 2007. TOTAL EXPERT WITNESS FEES AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF ON LINE 8(B): $5,688.00 LINE 11: THE MODELS AND BLOW-UPS WERE REASONABLY HELPFUL TO AID THE TRIERS OF FACT, AND THE MOTION TO TAX COST FOR THEIR PREPARATION IS DENIED. SEE CCP 1033.5(A)(12). BASE ON THE FOREGOING, PLAINTIFF'S AWARDED COSTS ARE $12,184.97. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE MILLER, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 318)
